[EndSkill] 解除<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[DragonLance]与[CondensedBlood]，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>陣亡

levelList.name: 宁作吾
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加2級[Breath]強度
[BeforeAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Breath]強度与[Breath]層数之和不低于5点，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1

[BeforeAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有[SeniorCianjing]，則使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+27%
